prose:
**Acrolein condensed Fukui reactivity analysis** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF (version as in chemkit default), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single‐point on the supplied `/home/erobles/…/acrolein.xyz` (no geometry optimization). SCF converged cleanly for the neutral, cation (doublet), and anion (doublet) states. Condensed Mulliken charges were used to compute f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, and the dual descriptor per atom.

Most electrophilic site: atom 4 (C) with f⁺ = 0.64232102
Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O) with f⁻ = 0.39388616

Live .out log path: fukui_<timestamp>.out (in your current working directory; you can `tail -f` it to watch the PySCF SCF cycles and any warnings).

Reproducibility artifacts:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/…/cli.py fukui acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out acrolein_fukui_dft.json`
• JSON result saved to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp1h_x5h7z/live.json`
